tldr: The conflict between the United States and Iran has escalated, with both sides striking targets and US marines boarding a commercial tanker in the Gulf of Oman.
Andy Burnham has become the new leader of the Labour party, positioning himself to potentially become the next UK Prime Minister.
President Trump reiterated unsubstantiated claims of China interfering in the 2020 US election, drawing criticism from China and Democrats.

market.why: Equity markets closed lower, with the S&P 500 down 38.63 points and the Nasdaq Composite down 387.28 points, amid escalating geopolitical tensions between the US and Iran which have driven oil prices higher, and a CNBC survey indicating a worsening economic outlook. A slump in semiconductor stocks also contributed to the Nasdaq's decline.

yield_10y.why: The 10-year Treasury yield increased by 0.02% to 4.57%, as the escalating US-Iran conflict and resulting rise in oil prices fueled concerns about inflation, prompting investors to demand higher yields.

vix.why: The VIX rose by 1.06 points to 16.73, reflecting increased market volatility and investor uncertainty driven by the escalating conflict between the US and Iran and a reported worsening economic outlook.

tech.summary: Apple has issued legal letters to dozens of OpenAI employees, signaling intensified competition for talent in the artificial intelligence sector.
Truth Social, the social media platform, is launching "Truth API" to offer Wall Street traders and businesses high-speed access to market-moving posts from influential accounts.
Epic Games is integrating AI-powered voices and personas into Fortnite, allowing creators to use 36 pre-defined characters as NPCs starting July 30th.

world.summary: The conflict between the United States and Iran has escalated, with US forces boarding a commercial tanker in the Gulf of Oman and striking Iranian airport and bridges, while Iran claims to have attacked US fighter jets.

Andy Burnham has been named the new leader of the Labour party, expressing readiness to challenge the 'new right' and indicating his party's ambition for him to become the next British Prime Minister.

President Trump alleged China interfered in the 2020 US presidential election and questioned voting security, claims that China dismissed as fabricated and Democrats called 'lies and long-debunked conspiracies'.
